---
title: "To be determined"
format: 
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    embed-resources: true
editor: source
---

## Measures, 1

-   Outcome variables
-   Independent variables
-   Covariates

## Measures, 2

-   Outcome measures
-   Process measures
-   Balancing measures

## Measures, 3

-   Self-report
-   Researcher evaluation


## Measures, 4

-   Social constructs (soft)
-   Physical measurement (hard)

## Measures, 5

-   Patient oriented evidence that matters (POEM)
    -   Morbidity
    -   Mortality
    -   Quality of life
    -   Symptom relief
-   Surrogate outcomes

::: notes

:::
